description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mstrasuns/ubuntu-dlang:2.081 Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a single test stage and add an expected-compiles job that runs the shell command ci/test-expected.sh. Add a samples job that runs ci/test-samples.sh, captures coverage using the regex /is \d+\.\d+% covered/, and stores the files matching cov/source-*.lst as artifacts that expire after one week. Add a unittest job that runs dub test.
